title: GenIE: Generative Information Extraction
author: Martin Josifoski
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the data and the models released with the paper "GenIE: Generative Information Extraction". Please see the  GitHub repository  associated with the project for a more detailed description of our work, a PyTorch implementation of the proposed system GenIE, and a comprehensive  demo .
